title: Crash when exporting CSV on Windows
body:
Version: 1.4.2
OS: Windows 11
Steps to reproduce:
1. Open reports
2. Click Export CSV
Expected behavior: CSV downloads
Actual behavior: app crashes
Error: Cannot read properties of undefined

title: App not working
body: It crashes. Please fix fast.

title: Feature request: add CSV import
body: Problem: users manually copy data. Proposed solution: add CSV import. Impact: faster onboarding.

title: How do I connect this to Stripe?
body: Question: can someone explain the setup? I am not reporting a bug.

title: Possible auth bypass vulnerability
body: I found an exploit that may allow account takeover. Should I post details here?

title: Docs typo in installation guide
body: The README installation command has a typo in the npm command.

title: Login fails on Ubuntu
body:
Version: 2.0.1
OS: Ubuntu 24.04
Steps to reproduce: open login page and submit valid credentials
Expected: dashboard opens
Actual: login fails
Error: 500 server error

title: Dark mode proposal
body: Feature request: add dark mode. Problem: night usage is hard. Proposed solution: theme toggle. Impact: better accessibility.

title: Question about Docker setup
body: How do I configure Docker compose for local development?

title: SQL injection concern
body: I found a possible SQL injection in the search endpoint and want to report it safely.

title: Broken link in docs
body: Documentation link in docs/getting-started.md points to a missing page.

title: Upload button does nothing
body:
Version: 0.9.0
OS: macOS 15
Steps to reproduce: click Upload
Expected behavior: file picker opens
Actual behavior: nothing happens
Logs: no console output

title: Need help with environment variables
body: Question: where should I put the API URL in local setup?

title: Feature request: webhook retry settings
body: Problem: failed webhooks are retried too aggressively. Proposed solution: configurable retry delay. Impact: less load.

title: Remote code execution report
body: I may have found an RCE path through archive extraction.

title: Search crashes with empty query
body:
Version: 3.1.0
Environment: Node 24
Steps to reproduce: submit empty search
Expected behavior: show all results
Actual behavior: crash
Exception: TypeError query.trim is not a function

title: Package fails to install
body: npm install fails on Windows but I do not have logs yet.

title: Can I use this with React Native?
body: How can I use this package inside a React Native app?

title: Docs missing Python example
body: The docs explain Node usage but documentation does not show a Python example.

title: Feature request: export to PDF
body: Problem: users need shareable reports. Proposed solution: add PDF export. Impact: easier reporting.

title: XSS vulnerability in markdown preview
body: I found an XSS issue in markdown preview. Please direct me to private security reporting.

title: Settings page fails on Firefox
body:
Version: 1.7.3
OS: Linux
Browser: Firefox
Steps to reproduce: open settings page
Expected: settings render
Actual: blank page
Error: ReferenceError ResizeObserver is not defined

title: How to reset my cache?
body: Question: is there a command to clear the cache?

title: CLI docs have outdated flag
body: The README says --dryrun but the CLI help says --dry-run.

title: Feature request: custom labels
body: Problem: teams use different label names. Proposed solution: config mapping. Impact: easier adoption.

title: Data leak in debug logs
body: Debug logs may expose secret tokens. I want to report a possible data leak.

title: Import fails on Node 24
body:
Version: 2.2.0
Environment: Node 24
Steps to reproduce: import package in ESM project
Expected behavior: module loads
Actual behavior: import fails
Error: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND

title: Support question: recommended deployment
body: Question: what deployment setup do maintainers recommend?

title: Documentation request: config examples
body: Docs need more examples for custom labels and routing.

title: Bug report missing details
body: The screen is blank after update.
